mapper.select: SELECT CAST(r.role_id AS CHAR) AS value, r.role_name AS label FROM sys_role r WHERE r.is_deleted = 0 AND r.status = 1 ORDER BY r.role_id ASC
SELECT CAST(d.dept_id AS CHAR) AS value, d.dept_name AS label FROM sys_department d WHERE d.is_deleted = 0 AND d.status = 1 ORDER BY d.sort ASC, d.dept_id ASC
SELECT r.role_name FROM sys_role r WHERE r.role_id = #{roleId} AND r.is_deleted = 0 AND r.status = 1 LIMIT 1
SELECT d.dept_name FROM sys_department d WHERE d.dept_id = #{deptId} AND d.is_deleted = 0 AND d.status = 1 LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_user ( user_id, user_name, real_name, password, role_id, role_name, dept_id, dept_name, phone, email, status, create_user_id, is_deleted ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{userName}, #{realName}, #{password}, #{roleId}, #{roleName}, #{deptId}, #{deptName}, #{phone}, #{email}, #{status}, #{createUserId}, #{isDeleted} )
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_user SET user_name = #{userName}, real_name = #{realName}, role_id = #{roleId}, role_name = #{roleName}, dept_id = #{deptId}, dept_name = #{deptName}, phone = #{phone}, email = #{email}, status = #{status}, update_time = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT u.user_id AS userId, u.user_name AS userName, u.real_name AS realName, u.role_id AS roleId, u.role_name AS roleName, u.dept_id AS deptId, u.dept_name AS deptName, u.phone AS phone, u.email AS email, u.status AS status, CASE u.status WHEN 1 THEN '启用' WHEN 0 THEN '禁用' ELSE '未知' END AS statusText FROM sys_user u WHERE u.user_id = #{userId} AND u.is_deleted = 0 LIMIT 1

SELECT u.user_id AS userId, u.user_name AS userName, u.real_name AS realName, u.role_id AS roleId, u.role_name AS roleName, u.dept_id AS deptId, u.dept_name AS deptName, u.phone AS phone, u.email AS email, u.status AS status, CASE u.status WHEN 1 THEN '启用' WHEN 0 THEN '禁用' ELSE '未知' END AS statusText, u.last_login_time AS lastLoginTime, u.create_time AS createTime, u.update_time AS updateTime, u.create_user_id AS createUserId FROM sys_user u WHERE u.user_id = #{userId} AND u.is_deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_user SET is_deleted = 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT u.user_id AS userId, u.user_name AS userName, u.real_name AS realName, u.role_id AS roleId, u.status AS status FROM sys_user u WHERE u.user_id = #{userId} AND u.is_deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
SELECT u.user_id AS userId, u.user_name AS userName, u.real_name AS realName, u.role_id AS roleId, u.status AS status FROM sys_user u WHERE u.user_name = #{userName} AND u.is_deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_user SET password = #{encodedPassword}, update_time = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_operation_log ( log_id, user_id, real_name, module, operation_type, operation_content, request_ip, operation_time, is_deleted ) VALUES ( #{logId}, #{userId}, #{realName}, #{module}, #{operationType}, #{operationContent}, #{requestIp}, #{operationTime}, #{isDeleted} )
